shangxiawuliao.name: Material Loading
shangxiawuliao.desc: Intelligent material loading & unloading system, enabling automated material handling with multi-station coordination.

dingweiduiqi.name: Positioning
dingweiduiqi.desc: High-precision positioning & alignment system with vision-guided sub-millimeter accuracy for precision assembly.

lianjieguding.name: Fastening
lianjieguding.desc: Automated connection & fastening system supporting bolting, riveting, and snap-fit processes.

quexianjiance.name: Defect Detection
quexianjiance.desc: AI vision-based defect detection system identifying scratches, cracks, and discoloration with 99.5% accuracy.

rouxingshineng.name: Flexible Enablement
rouxingshineng.desc: Flexible enablement platform using force control and compliant motion for adaptive surface processing.

wusunjiance.name: NDT Testing
wusunjiance.desc: Non-destructive testing using ultrasonic and X-ray methods to detect internal defects and ensure reliability.

xingneng.name: Performance Testing
xingneng.desc: Comprehensive product testing covering electrical performance, mechanical strength, and sealing integrity.

zhinengmaduo.name: Smart Palletizing
zhinengmaduo.desc: Intelligent palletizing planning system that auto-calculates optimal stacking patterns for warehouse efficiency.

cankuduijie.name: Warehouse Interface
cankuduijie.desc: Automated warehouse docking system enabling seamless integration with AGV dispatch and WMS.

chengpingbaoz.name: Weighing & Packing
chengpingbaoz.desc: Smart weighing and packaging system for automated sealing, labeling, and bundling processes.

lujinguihua.name: Path Planning
lujinguihua.desc: Robot motion path planning with environment sensing for obstacle avoidance and multi-robot coordination.

wuxulailiao.name: Unordered Picking
wuxulailiao.desc: Uses 3D vision and robotic arm planning to pick randomly stacked parts and place them into a sorting buffer for orderly feeding.

youxugongliao.name: Ordered Feeding
youxugongliao.desc: Organizes scattered parts via vibratory feeders and conveyors into uniform orientation, with vision-guided precision placement to workstations.

duowuliaoxietong.name: Multi-Material Sync
duowuliaoxietong.desc: Manages multiple material types simultaneously, coordinating feeders and conveyor lines for accurate mixed-model production.

xialiaofendao.name: Sortation & Diversion
xialiaofendao.desc: Diverts finished or semi-finished products to different channels based on model, quality grade, or target process.

wuliaoshaicha.name: Material Screening
wuliaoshaicha.desc: Pre-inspects incoming materials for appearance, size, and weight, automatically rejecting non-conforming items to ensure line quality.

shijuedingwei.name: Vision Positioning
shijuedingwei.desc: High-speed 2D/3D industrial cameras with deep learning algorithms identify part pose and guide robots to precise pick/place positions.

jiguangduizhun.name: Laser Alignment
jiguangduizhun.desc: Laser rangefinding and structured light projection for sub-millimeter real-time measurement and alignment of assembly surfaces or weld seams.

jixiedingwei.name: Mechanical Locating
jixiedingwei.desc: Pin-based fixtures and guide mechanisms achieve high-repeatability positioning, with quick-change systems for multi-variant production.

liuweibuchang.name: 6-DOF Compensation
liuweibuchang.desc: Six-axis force sensors detect contact forces in real-time, automatically compensating pose deviations for peg-in-hole and surface fitting tasks.

luoshuaningsuo.name: Bolt Tightening
luoshuaningsuo.desc: Smart tightening systems with torque and angle monitoring execute bolting strategies (torque, angle, yield-point) automatically.

maojieliangjie.name: Riveting
maojieliangjie.desc: Self-piercing riveting or press riveting for high-strength joining of dissimilar materials (e.g., aluminum-steel) without pre-drilling.

jiaozhanyajie.name: Adhesive Bonding
jiaozhanyajie.desc: Precision dispensing systems combined with press mechanisms for structural and thermal adhesives, ensuring consistent bead width and thickness.

kakouguding.name: Snap-Fit Assembly
kakouguding.desc: Force-controlled robots identify snap-fit positions, apply controlled pressure, and verify seat confirmation through force feedback.

biaomianhuahen.name: Scratch Detection
biaomianhuahen.desc: High-resolution line-scan cameras with multi-angle lighting detect micro-scratches on metal or plastic surfaces down to 0.02mm width.

liewen.name: Crack Detection
liewen.desc: Combines fluorescent penetrant, magnetic particle inspection and AI image analysis to detect surface and subsurface cracks in castings and forgings.

bianse.name: Discoloration Check
bianse.desc: Colorimeters and multispectral cameras analyze surface color consistency, detecting oxidation, burn marks, and coating defects with ΔE<0.5.

chicunpiancha.name: Dimensional Check
chicunpiancha.desc: Blue-light scanning or laser profilers perform 100% inline measurement of critical dimensions, auto-comparing against CAD models.

likongshiying.name: Force-Adaptive Control
likongshiying.desc: Integrated 6-axis force sensor compliant control system that adjusts end-effector force and pose in real-time to adapt to workpiece variations.

qumiandamoqi.name: Surface Polishing
qumiandamoqi.desc: Flexible polishing tools with force feedback automatically adjust contact pressure and angle along complex curved surfaces for uniform finishing.

rousunkongzhi.name: Compliant Control
rousunkongzhi.desc: Combined impedance and admittance control enables robots to respond compliantly to unknown environments, ideal for human-robot collaboration.

chaoshengbojiance.name: Ultrasonic Testing
chaoshengbojiance.desc: Detects internal voids, inclusions, and lack-of-fusion defects in welds and castings using ultrasonic wave propagation and reflection.

xshexianjiance.name: X-Ray Inspection
xshexianjiance.desc: Industrial CT/DR digital radiography provides 3D internal structure imaging of metals and composites with micrometer-level resolution.

waiguansuomiao.name: Surface Scanning
waiguansuomiao.desc: 360° multi-angle 3D scanning captures complete surface point clouds for reconstruction and comparison against reference models.

dianqiceshi.name: Electrical Testing
dianqiceshi.desc: Automated electrical test systems covering withstand voltage, insulation resistance, contact resistance, and continuity with high-speed parallel channels.

jixieqiangdu.name: Mechanical Strength
jixieqiangdu.desc: Universal testing machines with auto-clamping for tensile, compression, bending, and impact tests with automatic force-displacement recording.

mifengxing.name: Leak Testing
mifengxing.desc: Differential pressure or flow-based leak detection for housings and sealed assemblies, with sensitivity down to 0.01 cc/min.

naijiuxing.name: Durability Testing
naijiuxing.desc: Accelerated life testing under coupled temperature, humidity, and vibration stresses to rapidly evaluate expected product lifespan.

hunhemaduo.name: Mixed Palletizing
hunhemaduo.desc: Real-time algorithms compute optimal stacking combinations for multi-SKU boxes, achieving 95%+ pallet space utilization.

gaosumaduo.name: High-Speed Palletizing
gaosumaduo.desc: Delta robots with vision tracking achieve 30+ picks per minute, meeting FMCG production line throughput requirements.

chaizhuomaduo.name: Depalletizing
chaizhuomaduo.desc: 3D vision identifies layer-by-layer positions and orientations on incoming pallets, sequentially picking and placing onto conveyors.

agvdiaodu.name: AGV Dispatching
agvdiaodu.desc: Multi-vehicle coordination system managing path planning, task allocation, and traffic control for dozens of AGV/AMR units in the facility.

wmsjicheng.name: WMS Integration
wmsjicheng.desc: Deep integration with warehouse management systems for fully automated inbound, outbound, and inventory operations with FIFO and batch tracing.

liticangku.name: AS/RS Docking
liticangku.desc: Communication interface with automated storage/retrieval systems (stacker cranes, shuttles) for end-to-end unmanned material flow.

jingquejizhong.name: Precision Weighing
jingquejizhong.desc: High-precision dynamic weighing system measures in-line with ±0.5g accuracy, auto-rejecting over/under-weight products.

zidongfengxiang.name: Auto Case Packing
zidongfengxiang.desc: Integrated case erecting, packing, and sealing line with auto box selection, hot-melt or tape sealing at 20 cases/minute.

tiebiaodabao.name: Labeling & Banding
tiebiaodabao.desc: Print-and-apply labeling with barcode/QR generation, combined with PP strapping or stretch wrapping for secure packaging.

bizhangguihua.name: Obstacle Avoidance
bizhangguihua.desc: Real-time dynamic obstacle avoidance fusing LiDAR and depth camera data for safe robot navigation in complex workstation environments.

zuijianlujing.name: Shortest Path
zuijianlujing.desc: A*, RRT*, and other path search algorithms compute time-optimal or energy-optimal trajectories under given kinematic constraints.

duojixietong.name: Multi-Robot Sync
duojixietong.desc: Multiple robots coordinate in shared workspaces through real-time communication and collision prediction for interference-free scheduling.
